title: Multipack - Plastic Furniture Sliders - 4 Pack - 3.5" 9cm - Carpet Protector Gliders by Love your Wood (1, Plastic Furniture Sliders)
features: Versatile Usage: Ideal for tables, sofas, wardrobes, dressers, reclining chairs, safes, heavy appliances, and more.

Effortless Mobility: Simply place these sliders under your large and heavy furniture pieces to glide them across carpeted surfaces without scratching or damaging the floor. Say goodbye to getting stuck on carpets during movement.

Secure Sliding: The soft EVA foam layer ensures a snug fit under your furniture, preventing the sliders from slipping off during use. This feature allows your furniture to sink in slightly, providing stability and facilitating precise positioning.

Reusable and User-Friendly: These sliders are reusable, making them a cost-effective solution for frequent furniture rearrangements. Easy to use and maintain, they streamline the process of moving heavy items with minimal effort.
Make furniture rearrangements a breeze with our Furniture Sliders. Order now and experience the convenience firsthand!
Package Includes: Pack of 4 Furniture Sliders
description: Upgrade your furniture moving experience with our Furniture Sliders. Whether you're rearranging your living space or relocating heavy appliances, these sliders are designed to make the process effortless and damage-free.
